member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Flow.Core.IFlowDocumentRepository
member.summary: Provides a unified interface for managing spreadsheet workbooks. Extends IDocumentProvider with spreadsheet-specific creation capabilities.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Flow.Core.InMemoryFlowDocumentRepository
member.summary: Repository for multi-document orchestration scenarios. Manages multiple flow documents in memory with support for creation and import.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Flow.Core.InMemoryFlowDocumentRepository.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with no documents.
member.param: Timeout for import operations, or null to allow unlimited time.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Flow.Core.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering Flow document agent tools with an .

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Flow.Core.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddFlowAgentTools(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Core.DocumentProcessingOptions)
member.summary: Adds Flow document agent tools to the service collection.
